source_comparison.expected_source_material: Official CIS Microsoft Windows Server 2025 Benchmark PDF or Build Kit obtained under the user's own CIS terms

notes: Windows Server 2025 starter metadata. Import and review the complete authorized CIS Server 2025 control set before claiming Level 1 coverage or compliance.

controls.title: Block Microsoft accounts
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Prevents adding or logging on with consumer Microsoft accounts on enterprise-managed endpoints.
controls.validation_note: Read the registry value and compare to 3.

controls.title: Force audit policy subcategory settings to override category settings
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Preserves granular audit policy behavior for more reliable audit coverage.
controls.validation_note: Read the registry value and compare to 1.

controls.title: Restrict clients allowed to make remote calls to SAM
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Limits remote SAM enumeration to administrators instead of a placeholder numeric string.
controls.validation_note: Read the exact SDDL string and compare to the authorized benchmark value.

controls.title: LAN Manager authentication level
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Refuses legacy LM and NTLM authentication and requires NTLMv2 responses.
controls.validation_note: Read the registry value and compare to 5.

controls.title: Public firewall profile does not merge local firewall rules
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Prevents unmanaged local firewall exceptions on untrusted public networks.
controls.validation_note: Read the registry value and compare to 0.

controls.title: Disable SMBv1 client driver
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Disables the legacy SMBv1 client driver to reduce exposure to obsolete SMB attacks.
controls.validation_note: Read the registry value and compare to 4; reboot may be required.

controls.title: Disable SMBv1 server
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Disables SMBv1 server support to reduce legacy protocol attack surface.
controls.validation_note: Read the registry value and compare to 0; reboot may be required.

controls.title: Harden NETLOGON UNC path
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Requires mutual authentication and integrity for domain NETLOGON access when domain joined.
controls.validation_note: Enable for domain-joined systems after confirming domain requirements.

controls.title: Harden SYSVOL UNC path
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Requires mutual authentication and integrity for domain SYSVOL access when domain joined.
controls.validation_note: Enable for domain-joined systems after confirming domain requirements.

controls.title: Enable screen saver for all interactive users
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Applies the user control to loaded user hives by default and to signed-out/default profile hives only when explicitly requested.
controls.validation_note: Compare loaded user SID values to 1. Include signed-out and default profile hives only when offline hive access has been approved.

controls.title: Always install with elevated privileges is disabled for all interactive users
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Prevents per-user MSI elevation policy that can enable privilege escalation.
controls.validation_note: Compare loaded user SID values to 0. Include signed-out and default profile hives only when offline hive access has been approved.

controls.title: Apply local password and account lockout policy template
controls.attack_surface_reduction: Raises password length, complexity, history, and lockout settings for standalone local policy where domain GPO does not override it.
controls.validation_note: Export local security policy with secedit or inspect net accounts; domain GPO may override local settings. This aggregate starter control is not complete pass/fail evidence.
